textEn: Indeed, We sent it [i.e., the Qur’ān] down during the Night of Decree.
And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

textAr: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
textEn: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

textAr: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
textEn: The angels and the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
